zh.title: 龙树谅预言全集 - 预知梦漫画家的15条预言与验证 | たつき諒
zh.description: 日本漫画家龙树谅（たつき諒）1999年出版《私が見た未来》，封面精准预言2011年3月东日本大地震。2021年出版完全版，补充更多预知梦内容。本站收录15条预言并进行验证分析。
zh.keywords: 龙树谅,たつき諒,私が見た未来,预知梦,东日本大地震预言,2025年7月预言,漫画预言,日本预言家,富士山喷火,大海啸
zh.ogTitle: 龙树谅预言全集 | たつき諒の予知夢
zh.ogDescription: 日本漫画家龙树谅的预知梦预言完整收录与验证。1999年漫画封面精准预言2011年3·11大地震。
zh.twitterDescription: 15条龙树谅的预知梦预言，含真实度验证。最著名预言：1999年漫画封面写下「大灾难は2011年3月」，精准预言东日本大地震。

en.title: Tatsuki Ryo Prophecies - 15 Prophetic Dreams from the Manga Artist | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Japanese manga artist Tatsuki Ryo (たつき諒) published 'The Future I Saw' in 1999, with the cover predicting a great disaster in March 2011 — the Tohoku earthquake. This site archives 15 of her prophetic dream predictions with verification.
en.keywords: Tatsuki Ryo,たつき諒,The Future I Saw,prophetic dreams,Tohoku earthquake prediction,2025 July prediction,manga prophecy,Japanese prophet,Mount Fuji eruption,tsunami prediction
en.ogTitle: Tatsuki Ryo Prophecies - Prophetic Dreams from the Manga Artist
en.ogDescription: 15 prophetic dream predictions from Japanese manga artist Tatsuki Ryo. Her 1999 manga cover famously predicted the March 2011 Tohoku earthquake.
en.twitterDescription: 15 prophetic dreams from manga artist Tatsuki Ryo. Her 1999 manga cover predicted 'Great disaster March 2011' — the Tohoku earthquake.
